select.note: SELECT: S3.7; deps S3.4+S3.6 COMPLETED. REQ-152 -> IN_PROGRESS

plan.note: PLAN: (1) hazardsAndGoal += lethal check — spike/movingHazard always lethal, laser lethal only on-phase (pure fn of tick: (tick-spawnTick)*dt + phaseSeconds mod periodSeconds < onFractionOfPeriod*periodSeconds); player SWEPT segment (playerPrevPosition->playerPosition) vs Minkowski-enlarged hazard AABB (+hazard per-tick delta) so miss=skip is impossible; lethal -> defeated, before goal. (2) NEW Sensors.ts (pipeline: after physics, before hazardsAndGoal): plate/zone source active when player overlaps its AABB; fire TriggerDefs in AUTHORED ORDER on rising edge (once=first-ever, else each edge); actions open/close/toggleDoor, collapseFloor (set firstContactTick=tick), activatePlatform (set activationTick=tick). WorldState += playerPrevPosition + triggerActivePrev[] + triggerFired[]; EntityState += doorOpen (init initiallyOpen); isSolidEntity door reads doorOpen. Layering test >=3 mechanics.

anchor.note: ANCHOR: additive WorldState/EntityState extensions; new Sensors module; hazardsAndGoal extended (outcome contract unchanged: -> defeated/completed); 171-test suite is regression gate (door tests currently read initiallyOpen == doorOpen at init, so no behavior change)

implement.note: IMPLEMENT: HazardsAndGoal lethal swept check (laser pure-fn-of-tick, segment-vs-Minkowski-AABB slab test) + Sensors.ts (rising-edge triggers, authored order, closed action union); WorldState += playerPrevPosition/triggerActivePrev/triggerFired; EntityState += doorOpen; isSolidEntity door reads doorOpen
